profile_backing.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-pass182-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg --quick --noplot

lever.description: Two-panel packed/KC-blocked GEMM microkernel: compute two adjacent NR=8 column panels for one MR=4 row tile inside the same ascending-l loop, reusing each A scalar across 16 columns.

focused.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf49-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64 --quick --noplot

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf49-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64 --quick --noplot

confirmatory_full_profile.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf49-profile-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg --quick --noplot

delta.decision: Reject: focused benchmark looked faster only because its baseline was inconsistent with the immediately preceding full-profile baseline; confirmatory full-profile run regressed GEMM2048.

behavior_proof.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf49-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture
isomorphism: Candidate preserved each output element's ascending k accumulation order.
Candidate preserved B panel layout, row/thread partitioning, column/remainder coverage, dtype/shape/error surface, and RNG absence.
No source change is shipped after rejection; final tree behavior is bit-for-bit the pre-candidate behavior.

next_route.primitive: materially different GEMM or linalg caller primitive
next_route.target_ratio: >= 1.10x against the full-profile row, not only a noisy focused baseline
next_route.notes: Do not repeat adjacent column-panel unrolling without a same-run A/B harness or a stable full-profile win. Consider output-write avoidance in GEMM callers, blocked QR/LU structure, or a parity-contract bead for exact-order alternatives.
